records.question: What storms named One have a maximum speed of exactly 995 and caused no more than 13 million dollars in damage?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT storm.storm_id FROM storm
JOIN affected_region ON storm.storm_id = affected_region.storm_id
WHERE storm.damage_millions_usd <= 13.0 AND storm.max_speed = 995 AND storm.name = 'One'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT storm_id 
FROM storm 
WHERE Name = 'One' 
  AND Max_speed = 995 
  AND Damage_millions_USD <= 13

records.question: Which storms named Three have a max speed exactly 972, caused no more than 52 deaths, resulted in exactly 13 million dollars in damage, and affected at least 30 cities?

JOIN affected_region ON storm.storm_id = affected_region.storm_id
WHERE storm.number_deaths <= 52 AND affected_region.number_city_affected >= 30.0 AND storm.max_speed = 972 AND storm.damage_millions_usd = 13.0 AND storm.name = 'Three'

FROM

INNER JOIN
